description_long: This sculpture depicts a group of five human figures, rendered in a rough, expressive style that emphasizes texture and form. The central figure is seated, with an arm around a standing child to the left and another child to the right, both of whom appear to be seeking comfort or support. A third child is kneeling or sitting at the feet of the central figure, while a fourth child stands close behind, partially embracing the central figure. The figures are closely grouped on an irregular, oval base that mimics the look of natural ground. The surface is highly textured, with visible tool marks and an unfinished, clay-like appearance. The overall composition conveys a sense of unity, protection, and familial connection.
description: A textured, clay-like sculpture of five closely grouped human figures, with a central seated figure surrounded by children in various poses. The expressive, rough surface and intimate arrangement evoke themes of family and protection.
description_view_0: The front view shows the central seated figure with arms around two children, one kneeling at the feet and another standing to the right, highlighting the protective embrace.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the standing child to the left, who is being embraced by the central figure, and reveals the rough, unfinished texture of the figures' backs.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backs of the figures, showing the close grouping and the way the children cluster around the central figure.
description_view_3: This angled view highlights the kneeling child at the base and the intimate arrangement of the figures around the seated central figure.
attribute_subject_matter: group of human figures in a familial embrace
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a neutral background.
